name: Revenant
description: The Revenant is a Maliwan SMG from a fixed-element set, always spawning with a Maliwan barrel that gives it stronger status chance and damage over time than most weapons in its tier. A matching Maliwan grip pushes those elemental strengths even higher. It is not a flashy rarity piece, but its reliable slag output and steady damage-over-time can carry fights for a long time.
notes: Related Maliwan SMGs in this fixed-element set include Provacateur for incendiary, Venom for corrosive, and Vexation for shock. A similar cryo counterpart, Hyperborean, appears in Borderlands: The Pre-Sequel. A generation bug can cause blue versions to show purple title text on the item card, and with Colorblind Mode enabled they may even be labeled as purple instead of blue. As a result, blue and purple variants with identical parts can end up with the same stats. Random world drop from suitable loot sources.
